title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
